features.title: Handcrafted with French Oils
features.description: Proudly crafted in South Africa, our fragrances are meticulously formulated using premium French oils. We believe great scent-making is both an art and a rigorous process. From formulation to final production, we pour care and craftsmanship into every bottle, creating premium scents you can wear with absolute confidence.

features.title: Long Lasting
features.description: Our fragrances are engineered to endure, ensuring that your favorite scent stays with you throughout the day. From morning meetings to evening outings, trust The Perfume House to keep you smelling exceptional, longer.

features.title: Vegan + Cruelty Free
features.description: We pledge that all our fragrances are 100% vegan and cruelty-free, ensuring no animals are harmed and no animal byproducts are used in our creations.

features.title: Crafted with Passion
features.description: Every bottle is a labor of love. We design our fragrances to bring joy and confidence to your daily routine, ensuring that luxury is not just a name, but an everyday experience.

features.title: Luxury Scents For Everyone
features.description: Experience world-class scents, traditionally available to a select few, now accessible to everyone. Luxury isn't exclusive—it's universal.

features.title: Clean Formulations
features.description: Pure and safe, our formulations are crafted with transparency in mind. We exclude harmful chemicals and opt for cleaner, healthier ingredients in our scents.

trust_banner.title: Fast Delivery Nationwide
trust_banner.description: Courier dispatch direct to your door anywhere in South Africa. Safe and secure checkout options.

trust_banner.title: Trusted Clone Brand
trust_banner.description: Soon to be selling on Takealot and Amazon. The Perfume House has 100% premium quality formulation matching original scents.
